title: Web App: Skills Catalog

use_cases.name: Browse Skills Index
use_cases.description: Visitor views the /skills overview page listing all skills grouped by category with clickable chips
steps: Page shows: total skill count, category sections, skill chips linking to detail pages

use_cases.name: View Skill Detail Page
use_cases.description: Visitor views a single skill detail page with markdown body, demo, editorial, and references
steps: Returns pre-generated static HTML or 404 if missing
Page shows: skill header/tagline, meta strip (category, user-invocable, argumentHint), before/after demo, editorial prose, SKILL.md source card, reference collapsibles

use_cases.name: Fetch Skills JSON (API)
use_cases.description: Client fetches all skills as JSON array
steps: For each dir: reads SKILL.md, calls parseFrontmatter(content)
Returns array of { id, name, description, userInvocable }

use_cases.name: Fetch Commands JSON (API)
use_cases.description: Client fetches only user-invocable skills as JSON
steps: getCommands() → getSkills() → filters where userInvocable === true

use_cases.name: Pre-generate Skills Pages
use_cases.description: Static HTML for /skills and /skills/:id is generated at startup (dev) or build time (prod)
steps: generateSubPages(rootDir) called from server/index.js at module load
Calls buildSubPageData(rootDir) → returns { skills, skillsByCategory, tutorials, knownSkillIds, rules }
Skills index: renderDocsSidebar(skillsByCategory, tutorials, null) + renderSkillsOverviewMain(skillsByCategory) → wrapInDocsLayout() → renderPage() → writes public/skills/index.html
Skill detail pages: loop data.skills → renderDocsSidebar(…, { kind:'skill', id }) + renderSkillDetail(skill, knownSkillIds) → wrapInDocsLayout() → renderPage() → writes public/skills/{id}.html
Output dirs are wiped and recreated on each generation run

key_functions.getSkills(): api-handlers.js — reads source/skills/*/SKILL.md, parses frontmatter, returns [{id, name, description, userInvocable}]
key_functions.generateSubPages(rootDir): build-sub-pages.js — orchestrates all static HTML generation, returns {files:[]}
key_functions.renderSkillsOverviewMain(skillsByCategor: build-sub-pages.js — renders /skills index body: total count, CATEGORY_ORDER loop, skill chips with /skills/{id} hrefs
key_functions.renderSkillDetail(skill, knownSkillIds): build-sub-pages.js — renders detail article: hero header, renderSkillDemo(), editorial section, SKILL.md source card, references collapsibles
key_functions.renderDocsSidebar(skillsByCategory, tuto: build-sub-pages.js — unified sidebar for /skills and /tutorials; marks aria-current on active item
key_functions.serveGenerated(pagePath): server/index.js — serves a pre-generated file or returns 404

key_relationships: server/index.js imports generateSubPages from build-sub-pages.js (called at startup)
server/index.js imports getSkills, getCommands from api-handlers.js (called on API requests)
Routes /skills and /skills/:id serve static files (no runtime data fetch)
data_sources: source/skills/*/SKILL.md — frontmatter: name, description, user-invocable; body: markdown content
include_relationships: UC2 includes UC1 (detail page links back via sidebar)
UC3 is included in UC5 indirectly (buildSubPageData reads same skills data)
extend_relationships: UC2 extends with 404 response when skill id not found
important_notes: Pages are fully pre-generated static HTML — no SSR on request. /api/skills returns raw JSON (no HTML). Skill id is sanitized server-side (alphanumeric + hyphen only). Skills are grouped by CATEGORY_ORDER from sub-pages-data.js. User-invocable flag distinguishes commands from informational skills.
